mapper.select: SELECT id, title, img_src AS imgSrc, link, display_order AS displayOrder, starts_at AS startsAt, ends_at AS endsAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM promotions ORDER BY display_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotions (title, img_src, link, display_order, starts_at, ends_at, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{imgSrc}, #{link}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(display_order), 0) + 1000 FROM promotions), #{startsAt}, #{endsAt}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, img_src AS imgSrc, link, display_order AS displayOrder, starts_at AS startsAt, ends_at AS endsAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM promotions WHERE id = #{id}
